title: Resolve Prettier warnings in .beads and AGENTS.md
description: npm run lint fails because Prettier --check . flags .beads/{config.yaml,metadata.json,README.md} and AGENTS.md. Decide whether to ignore these paths or format them, then re-run lint.

title: Solidify bonkdocs pass
close_reason: Solidify pass items completed; schema regenerated and tests passing.

title: Decide doc persistence: wire or delete
description: Either remove unused doc persistence (doc-persistence.js/doc-cache.js/tests) or integrate save/load into doc-store so snapshots/metadata are actually used.
notes: COMPLETED: Removed unused doc persistence + doc-cache. Simplified doc-persistence to lastDocKey only, removed doc-cache usage from doc-store, deleted doc-cache tests and pared doc-persistence tests.
close_reason: Removed unused doc persistence/cache and associated tests; kept lastDocKey storage.

title: Release worker sync state when unused
description: Free DocWorker syncs when last watcher closes or doc removed to avoid unbounded memory growth.
notes: COMPLETED: Added DocWorker._releaseSync + _teardownWatchers; release sync/queues when last watcher stops and when docs removed.
close_reason: Release worker sync state and subscriptions when unused or doc removed.

title: Fix app state persistence (active doc) or remove plumbing
description: Either implement writeAppState in worker/local DB and call on selection, or remove readAppState + local state dispatch/schema if unused.
notes: COMPLETED: Removed runtime app state plumbing (readAppState + initialize activeDoc). Renderer already uses local lastDocKey; schema cleanup to follow in schema pruning task.
close_reason: Dropped unused app state read/initialize activeDoc plumbing; rely on renderer local lastDocKey.

title: Reset snapshot counter after restart
description: In DocWorker._ensureSync, set updatesSinceSnapshot = records.length even when snapshot exists so compaction cadence resumes after restart.
notes: COMPLETED: Always set updatesSinceSnapshot to number of updates since last snapshot on sync load.
close_reason: Ensure snapshot cadence resumes after restart by tracking updates since snapshot.

title: Centralize default title string
description: Replace renderer hardcoded 'Untitled document' with shared constant or renderer-local constant aligned to core/constants.js.
notes: COMPLETED: Added renderer/src/constants.ts DEFAULT_TITLE and replaced hardcoded 'Untitled document' usages in app/doc-store.
close_reason: Centralized renderer default title via DEFAULT_TITLE constant.

title: Apply awareness update immediately in worker
description: In DocWorker.applyAwareness, apply update to sync.awareness before appending to log to improve responsiveness.
notes: COMPLETED: Apply awareness update to in-memory sync awareness immediately before appending to log.
close_reason: Apply awareness updates immediately for responsiveness.

title: Prune unused schema fields or implement usage
description: Either remove unused rpc schema fields (snapshot/ops/doc-operation) or extend worker/renderer to use them; regenerate spec after changes.
notes: COMPLETED: Pruned unused schema fields/types (doc-operation, snapshot/ops/base/snapshot revisions, refresh/clientTime/title/invite extras), removed local state/profile schema + dispatch + context routes, updated worker responses to match. Regenerated spec/ via npm run schema:build (after wiping spec).
close_reason: Removed unused schema fields/routes and regenerated spec bundle.
